rationale: Educ. Code §37.102 governs school district rules for student safety, parking, and traffic on school property. It is wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may adopt rules for the safety and welfare of students, employees, and property
_note: No conflict. The cited rule concerns school district governance and traffic/parking rules, not property tax exemptions.
